languages.text: "Раз уж на то пошло, сержант, то, согласно Уставу, я тебе о своих действиях отчитываться не обязана. И, как твой непосредственный командир, я не отдавала тебе приказа участвовать в операции {mf|Его|Ее} светлости".

"Since you brought it up, Sergeant, the Handbook does not obligate me to report my actions to you. And as your direct superior, I did not give you leave to join {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship}'s operation."
languages.original_text: "Раз уж на то пошло, сержант, то, согласно Уставу, я тебе о своих действиях отчитываться не обязана. И, как твой непосредственный командир, я не отдавала тебе приказа участвовать в операции {mf|Его|Ее} светлости".

traits.locale_text: "Since you brought it up, Sergeant, the word of the Code does not obligate me to report my actions to you. And as your direct superior, I did not give you leave to join {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship}'s operation."

"Since you brought it up, Sergeant, the Code does not obligate me to report my actions to you. And as your direct superior, I did not give you leave to join {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship}'s operation."
"Janur, I outrank you and I have the right to make my own decisions."

"Since you brought it up, Sergeant, the word of the Code does not obligate me to report my actions to you. And as your direct superior, I did not give you leave to join {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship}'s operation."

"Since you brought it up, Sergeant, the Code does not obligate me to report my actions to you. And as your direct superior, I did not give you leave to join {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship}'s operation."

languages.text: 「ジャヌール、私はあなたより上官であり、自分の決断をする権利がある」
languages.original_text: "Janur, I outrank you and I have the right to make my own decisions."

traits.locale_text: 「ジャンヌル、私はあなたより上官であり、自分の決断をする権利がある」

languages.text: "Madem konuyu açtın Çavuş... El Kitabı, eylemlerimi sana bildirmemi zorunlu kılmıyor. Doğrudan amirin olarak sana {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri'nin operasyonuna katılma izni vermedim."
languages.original_text: "Since you brought it up, Sergeant, the Handbook does not obligate me to report my actions to you. And as your direct superior, I did not give you leave to join {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship}'s operation."

traits.locale_text: "Madem konuyu açtın Çavuş... El Kitabı, eylemlerimi sana bildirmemi zorunlu kılmıyor. Doğrudan amirin olarak sana {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri'nin operasyonuna katılma izni vermedim."

languages.text: «Ya que saca el tema, sargento, el manual no me obliga a informarle de mis acciones. Y, como su superior directa, no le había dado permiso para participar en la operación de mi{mf|lord|lady}».
languages.original_text: "Since you brought it up, Sergeant, the Handbook does not obligate me to report my actions to you. And as your direct superior, I did not give you leave to join {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship}'s operation."

traits.locale_text: «Ya que saca el tema, sargento, el manual no me obliga a informarle de mis acciones. Y, como su superior directa, no le había dado permiso para participar en la operación de mi{mf|lord|lady}».

languages.text: “既然你提起了，《手册》可没规定我事事都得向你汇报，军士。而且作为你的直属上级，我也没准许你加入大人的行动。”
languages.original_text: "Since you brought it up, Sergeant, the Handbook does not obligate me to report my actions to you. And as your direct superior, I did not give you leave to join {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship}'s operation."

traits.locale_text: “既然你提起了，《手册》可没规定我事事都得向你汇报，军士。而且作为你的直属上级，我也没准许你加入大人的行动。”

languages.text: « Puisque vous le mentionnez, sergent, le Manuel ne m'oblige en aucun cas à vous rendre des comptes. Et étant votre supérieure hiérarchique, il ne me semble pas vous avoir autorisé à participer à l'opération de Sa Seigneurie. »
languages.original_text: "Since you brought it up, Sergeant, the Handbook does not obligate me to report my actions to you. And as your direct superior, I did not give you leave to join {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship}'s operation."

traits.locale_text: « Puisque vous le mentionnez, sergent, le Manuel ne m'oblige en aucun cas à vous rendre des comptes. Et étant votre supérieure hiérarchique, il ne me semble pas vous avoir autorisé à participer à l'opération de Sa Seigneurie. »

languages.text: "Da Ihr es ansprecht, Sergeant, das Handbuch verpflichtet mich nicht, Euch gegenüber Rechenschaft abzulegen. Und als Eure direkte Vorgesetzte habe Ich Euch nicht gestattet, Euch der Operation {mf|Seiner Lordschaft|Ihrer Ladyschaft} anzuschließen."
languages.original_text: "Since you brought it up, Sergeant, the Handbook does not obligate me to report my actions to you. And as your direct superior, I did not give you leave to join {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship}'s operation."

traits.locale_text: "Da Ihr es ansprecht, Sergeant, das Handbuch verpflichtet mich nicht, Euch gegenüber Rechenschaft abzulegen. Und als Eure direkte Vorgesetzte habe Ich Euch nicht gestattet, Euch der Operation {mf|Seiner Lordschaft|Ihrer Ladyschaft} anzuschließen."
